/usr/bin/ar qc liblora_cpp_receiver.a CMakeFiles/lora_cpp_receiver.dir/src/chirp_generator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lora_cpp_receiver.dir/src/fft_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lora_cpp_receiver.dir/src/frame_sync.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lora_cpp_receiver.dir/src/header_decoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lora_cpp_receiver.dir/src/hamming.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lora_cpp_receiver.dir/src/iq_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lora_cpp_receiver.dir/src/preamble_detector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lora_cpp_receiver.dir/src/payload_decoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lora_cpp_receiver.dir/src/receiver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lora_cpp_receiver.dir/src/sample_rate_resampler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lora_cpp_receiver.dir/src/streaming_receiver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lora_cpp_receiver.dir/src/sync_word_detector.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib liblora_cpp_receiver.a
